name: Kroketakia Me Avga Ke Tyri (Egg & Cheese Cro
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the grated Kefalotiri cheese, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the 5 egg whites until stiff but not dry.
3. Gradually add the cheese mixture to the beaten egg whites, stirring constantly.
4. If needed, add a small amount of flour to achieve a thick consistency.
5. Shape the mixture into croquettes about 1 1/2 inches long.
6. Heat oil or butter in a frying pan.
7. Fry the croquettes until they reach a light golden color.
8. Remove from oil and drain on absorbent paper.
9. Serve hot.
